name: am-modern-ui
description: AM Investment Platform - Modern UI Task Runner

scripts.start:local: npm run config:local && npm run get:all && npm run run:app
scripts.start:local:quick: npm run config:local && npm run run:app
scripts.start:preprod: npm run config:preprod && npm run run:app
scripts.start:dev: npm run config:dev && npm run run:app
scripts.clean:core: npm run clean:common && npm run clean:design && npm run clean:lib
scripts.get:core: cd am_common && flutter pub get && cd ../am_design_system && flutter pub get && cd ../am_library && flutter pub get
scripts.gen:core: cd am_common && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.clean:market: cd am_market/sdk && flutter clean && cd ../common && flutter clean && cd ../ui && flutter clean && cd ../dev && flutter clean
scripts.get:market: cd am_market/sdk && flutter pub get && cd ../common && flutter pub get && cd ../ui && flutter pub get && cd ../dev && flutter pub get
scripts.gen:market:ui: cd am_market/ui && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.gen:market: cd am_market/common && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit && cd ../ui && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.test:market: cd am_market/common && flutter test && cd ../ui && flutter test
scripts.gen:portfolio: cd am_portfolio_ui && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.gen:trade: cd am_trade_ui && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.gen:auth: cd am_auth_ui && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.clean:analysis: cd am_analysis/sdk && flutter clean && cd ../common && flutter clean && cd ../ui && flutter clean
scripts.get:analysis: cd am_analysis/sdk && flutter pub get && cd ../common && flutter pub get && cd ../ui && flutter pub get
scripts.gen:dashboard: cd am_dashboard_ui && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs --force-jit
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:core && npm run clean:market && npm run clean:analysis && npm run clean:auth && npm run clean:dashboard && npm run clean:portfolio && npm run clean:trade && npm run clean:app
scripts.get:all: npm run get:core && npm run get:market && npm run get:analysis && npm run get:auth && npm run get:dashboard && npm run get:portfolio && npm run get:trade && npm run get:app
scripts.build:all: npm run get:all && npm run gen:all && npm run build:app
scripts.gen:all: npm run gen:core && npm run gen:market && npm run gen:analysis && npm run gen:auth && npm run gen:dashboard && npm run gen:portfolio && npm run gen:trade
scripts.test:all: npm run test:market && npm run test:portfolio && npm run test:trade

author: Antigravity
